etimesWho is Anthony Grove? Convicted child killer and parole violator arrested at a Florida spring break beachA dangerous Ohio man, Anthony Grove, with a history of involuntary manslaughter, was apprehended in Daytona Beach amidst spring break crowds. Wanted for parole violations, deputies discovered him during a beach sweep. Grove, previously released in 2023, now faces additional Florida charges including drug possession and failure to register as a felon, and is awaiting extradition.

etimesExplained: What is the Artemis II mission that will take astronauts around the Moon after half a century?NASA's Artemis II mission is set to launch in April 2026, sending a four-astronaut crew on a lunar flyby. This historic 10-day mission will mark the first crewed trip around the Moon since 1972, testing crucial systems for future deep-space travel without landing.

etimesHimachal Pradesh to see fresh rain and snow spell from March 26, says IMD; here are the places likely to see snowfallHimachal Pradesh is bracing for a fresh spell of unsettled weather starting March 26, with the IMD forecasting rain, snow, thunderstorms, and gusty winds. Higher reaches and districts like Kullu, Kangra, Mandi, and Chamba are expected to experience significant changes. Temperatures are also set to shift, with maximums potentially rising.
